---
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        -
          - "title: \\["
        -
          - "\\(title: \""
---

# Theorem Test - Inline Code in Title

::: {#exm-devtools}

## `devtools`

A useful package for R developers.

```r
install.packages("devtools")
```

:::

::: {#thm-bayes}

## `P(A|B)` = Bayes' Rule

If $P(B) > 0$, then $P(A|B) = \frac{P(B|A)P(A)}{P(B)}$.

:::

See @exm-devtools and @thm-bayes.
